accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context: BOEM, the rule title, 89 Fed. Reg. 71160, the CRA chapter 8 reference, and the dates are all correct.

no_hallucinations.why: The CRA characterization and 'treated as though it had never taken effect' description are accurate context, not fabrications.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill disapproves and nullifies the BOEM marine archaeological resources rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains the resolution nullifies a specific federal rule and identifies the CRA authority (chapter 8 of title 5) being used.

exceptions_conditions.why: This one-sentence CRA disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions, conditions, or carve-outs.

effective_dates.why: Accurately reports the Senate passage (Feb. 25), House passage (Mar. 6), and approval (Mar. 14, 2025) dates from the legislative history.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the bill's sole operative effect—disapproving the rule so it has no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent, moving from action to identification to mechanism to timeline.

concise.why: Appropriately brief with minimal repetition for a short resolution, though the CRA mechanism is explained twice.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Bureau of Ocean Energy Management, the Congressional Review Act, and the rule title.

correct_figures.why: The Federal Register citation (89 Fed. Reg. 71160), publication date, and all passage/approval dates are accurate.
